---
title: "Baseline pupil size is related to fluid intelligence: A reply to Unsworth et al. (2021)"

pub-authors:
  - Jason S. Tsukahara
  - Christopher Draheim
  - Randall W. Engle

pub-year: "2021"
date: "2021-10-01"
venue: "Cognition"
pub-type: "Journal Article"
pub-status: "Published"

categories:
  - pupillometry
  - measurement

pdf: "/publications/2021-cog-pupil-luminance-reply/2021-cog-pupil-luminance-reply.pdf"
data: ""
code: ""
doi: "10.1016/j.cognition.2021.104826"

project:
  - ac-brain

listing-page: false
format: html
---
